'''Zero Five Commando''' was one of the ten [[Commando Group]]s subordinated under the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]]. The unit was a [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]], led by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Bardan Jusik]]. [[Omega Squad|Omega]] and [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta]] [[Squad/Legends|squads]] were part of the unit. Following Jusik's resignation, [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] assumed command of the unit.<ref name="Triple Zero" />
